name: Enters Standby Mode
effect_description:

name: Enters Standby Mode
effect_description:
Stands by for 4 turns, 
during which 7 Dragon Balls appear 
and charge count increases by 1 
per Dragon Ball obtained by allies
condition_description:

in the same turn are "Demonic Power" 
Category characters starting from 
the 3rd turn from the start of battle, 
when all allies are Extreme Class 
starting from the 3rd turn from the 
start of battle, or starting from the 5th turn 
from the start of battle (once only)
